Auth.signupSubtitle: Start building digital menus for your restaurant.
Auth.name: Name

Onboarding.title: Create your first restaurant
Onboarding.subtitle: Just the name — we'll handle the rest. You can change the public URL later from settings.

menu.title: Build your menu
menu.subtitle: Snap a photo of your existing menu — we'll extract dishes and prices in seconds. You can review and edit everything before saving.
menu.skipHint: You can import a photo any time from the restaurant page.

Dashboard.title: A carta da casa.
Dashboard.subtitle: Each restaurant is a room in your house. Open one to edit menus, theme, and the QR you've already printed.
Dashboard.noRestaurantsHint: Create one to start building menus.

Restaurant.updateFromPhotoLede: Snap a new printed menu — we'll merge the changes into your live menu.
Restaurant.translateLede: {count, plural, =0 {AI-translate every dish into your other languages.} =1 {AI-translate every dish into 1 other language.} other {AI-translate every dish into # other languages.}}
Restaurant.qrCodeLede: Print stickers your guests can scan at the table.
Restaurant.settingsLede: Colours, fonts, logo, languages and slug.
Restaurant.viewPublicLede: See exactly what your guests see.
Restaurant.emptyLede: Take a photo of your printed menu — we'll read it. Or try a sample to see what the editor looks like first.
Restaurant.importMenuDescription: Upload a clear photo of your physical menu. AI will extract categories and dishes automatically.
Restaurant.importMenuPickFileHint: JPEG, PNG or WebP · up to 10 MB
Restaurant.importMenuUploadPhotoHint: JPEG, PNG or WebP · up to 10 MB
Restaurant.importMenuCameraDenied: Camera access was denied. You can still upload a photo from your device.
Restaurant.importMenuCameraUnavailable: No camera is available on this device. Upload a photo instead.
Restaurant.importMenuErrorQuota: Our AI service is at capacity right now. Try again in a few minutes — your photo wasn't used.
Restaurant.importMenuErrorAuth: The AI service is unavailable. Please contact support.
Restaurant.importMenuErrorNetwork: We couldn't reach the AI service. Check your connection and try again.
Restaurant.importMenuErrorParse: We had trouble reading this menu. Try a clearer photo with even lighting.
Restaurant.importMenuErrorTruncated: This menu is on the long side — we ran out of room mid-way. Try splitting it into sections (food, drinks, desserts) and importing each separately.
Restaurant.importMenuErrorUnknown: Something went wrong while building the menu. Try again.
Restaurant.importMenuApplyLanguage: Use {language} as this restaurant's default language
Restaurant.importMenuApplyLanguageHint: Only applied when you import. Uncheck to keep your current setting.
Restaurant.importMenuApplyLanguageNote: Your restaurant's default language will be set to {language}. You can change it later in Settings.
Restaurant.importMenuReviewTooltip: The AI was unsure about this row — double-check the name and price.
Restaurant.importMenuSuccessDescription: Your menu has been created from the photo. Open it to add photos, adjust prices, and reorder dishes.
Restaurant.noMenusHint: Create one to start adding categories.
Restaurant.refreshTranslationsSuccess: {rows, plural, =1 {# row} other {# rows}} synced to {languages}
Restaurant.refreshTranslationsNoTargets: Add another language in Settings first
Restaurant.refreshTranslationsError: Could not refresh translations. Try again.
Restaurant.aiTranslationDescription: Pick the languages you want to publish in. Only rows whose source changed since the last sync get re-translated.
Restaurant.aiTranslationNoTargets: Add another language in Settings before running AI translation.
Restaurant.aiTranslationTranslate: {count, plural, =0 {Translate} =1 {Translate to 1 language} other {Translate to # languages}}
Restaurant.aiTranslationSuccess: {rows, plural, =1 {# row} other {# rows}} synced to {languages}
Restaurant.aiTranslationUpToDate: Nothing changed since the last sync.
Restaurant.aiTranslationTranslatorFailed: Translation failed for {languages}. The next click will retry.
Restaurant.aiTranslationError: Could not run AI translation. Try again.
Restaurant.updateMenuDescription: Take a fresh photo of your menu. We compare it with what's saved and only change what's different — no need to re-enter everything.
Restaurant.updateMenuUploadPhotoHint: JPEG, PNG or WebP · up to 10 MB
Restaurant.updateMenuUnsupportedType: Use a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.
Restaurant.updateMenuTooLarge: That photo is over 10 MB. Try a smaller one.
Restaurant.updateMenuAiError: We had trouble reading this photo. Try another one with even lighting.
Restaurant.updateMenuReviewDescription: {changes, plural, =1 {1 change found} other {# changes found}}. Untick anything you don't want to apply.
Restaurant.updateMenuNoChanges: We didn't spot any differences — your menu is already up to date.
Restaurant.updateMenuBinAdd: {count, plural, =1 {1 new dish} other {# new dishes}}
Restaurant.updateMenuBinUpdate: {count, plural, =1 {1 price or name change} other {# price or name changes}}
Restaurant.updateMenuBinRemove: {count, plural, =1 {1 dish to remove} other {# dishes to remove}}
Restaurant.updateMenuBinCategories: {count, plural, =1 {1 section change} other {# section changes}}
Restaurant.updateMenuDoneDescription: {added, plural, =0 {No dishes added} =1 {1 dish added} other {# dishes added}} · {updated, plural, =0 {nothing updated} =1 {1 updated} other {# updated}} · {removed, plural, =0 {nothing removed} =1 {1 removed} other {# removed}}.

Identity.title: Identity
Identity.subtitle: Name, copy, and brand assets shown at the top of the menu.
Identity.name: Restaurant name
Identity.descriptionPlaceholder: A short tagline shown under the name.

Slug.title: Public URL
Slug.subtitle: Branded URL for marketing — QR sticker scans keep working either way.
Slug.label: URL
Slug.warning: Changing the URL breaks bookmarks to the old address.

Languages.title: Languages
Languages.subtitle: Pick which languages your menu supports and which is the default.
Languages.switchedSummary: {count, plural, =1 {Promoted 1 translation into the new default.} other {Promoted # translations into the new default.}}
Languages.switchedAttention: {count, plural, =1 {1 row had no translation in the new default — its original text is still showing through. Open that row to retranslate.} other {# rows had no translation in the new default — their original text is still showing through. Open each one to retranslate.}}

Qr.boundStickersExplanation: Pre-printed sticker codes the iedora team has assigned to your restaurant. This view is read-only — to print more, add labels, or rebind, contact us at hello@iedora.com.

Billing.title: Billing
Billing.currentPlanSubtitle: Switch any time. Changes apply on the next invoice.
Billing.aiMenuGenerationsPerWeek: {count, plural, =0 {No AI menu imports} =1 {1 AI menu import per week} other {# AI menu imports per week}}

casa.name: Casa
casa.tagline: Everything in Free, plus the tools to grow.

Misc.title: Misc
Misc.description: Plan-scoped usage that doesn't fit on Billing yet.
Misc.aiUsageTagline: Rolling 7-day window. Counts every AI-driven menu import on this organization.

Builder.emptyMenu: Your menu is empty. Add a section to get started.
Builder.emptySection: No dishes in this section yet. Tap "Add dish" below.
Builder.itemVariantsHint: Anything that prices the same dish differently — ½ dose, alcohol-free, large, take-away…
Builder.partTranslationsHint: for each language other than the default
Builder.itemVariantTranslationsHint: Leave blank to fall back to the source label.
Builder.deleteSectionConfirm: Remove "{name}" and every dish inside it?

signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.subtitle: Sign in to continue to iedora.
signIn.errorGeneric: Could not sign in. Please check your credentials.

signUp.title: Create your account
signUp.subtitle: It takes a minute.
signUp.errorGeneric: Could not create your account. Please try again.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.subtitle: Active sessions across every iedora product.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.description: Append-only timeline of every state change on the auth + admin surface. Gated by `staff:core:audit:read`.
audit.empty: No audit events match the current filter.

access.title: Access
access.description: Features are gated by scopes. A role is just a named bundle of scopes — what's shown below is the live binding, derived from the auth taxonomy.
access.verbCount: {count, plural, =0 {no verbs} one {# verb} other {# verbs}}

iedora-admin.description: Supreme cross-tenant role. Every scope on every resource.

iedora-support.description: Day-to-day user lifecycle. Cannot grant roles nor impersonate.

users.read: List and inspect users (incl. their sessions).
users.set-role: Grant or revoke staff roles. Privileged — admin-only.
users.impersonate: Sign in as another user. Privileged — admin-only.

orgs.get: View an org's members and pending invitations.

members.remove: Remove a member from an org (troubleshooting).
members.update-role: Promote or demote a member's org role. Privileged — admin-only (grants tenant owner).

sessions.list: List active sessions across every user.

audit.read: Read the append-only audit log of every state change on the auth + admin surface.

admin.read: Enter the cross-tenant admin shell. Held by every staff role.

qr-codes.read: View QR codes belonging to the org.
qr-codes.create: Mint new QR codes (single or bulk).
qr-codes.update: Bind an existing QR code to a restaurant.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.description: Every active session across every product.

users.title: Users
users.description: Every user on the platform, across every tenant.

ban.title: Ban user
ban.description: Ban {email}. They will be signed out of every active session.
ban.reasonPlaceholder: Optional — shown internally on audit log.

detail.descriptionSelf: This is you. Destructive actions are disabled.
detail.roleDesc: Cross-tenant role on the user row.

orgs.title: Organizations
orgs.description: Every tenant org on the platform.

Property.deleteDescription: This will remove the property from every platform it was published on.

IdealistaIntegrator.title: Idealista
IdealistaIntegrator.description: Publish and manage Idealista.pt listings using the agency account.
IdealistaIntegrator.note: Publishing is driven by Chrome automation over CDP — no API key needed.
